results.title: Can Alkane Resources (ASX:ALK) Extend Its Gold Growth Story After Björkdal Success?
results.description: Alkane Resources reports high-grade Björkdal drilling as strong production, expanding resources and gold market strength support its long-term growth outlook.

results.title: World Bank approves $376m to boost Pakistan’s electricity grid
results.description: The World Bank’s Board of Executive Directors approved $375.9 million in financing for Pakistan’s Grid Stability Enhancement Project, to strengthen the country’s national power transmission network under the Boosting Energy Security through Transmission in Pakistan (BEST-PAK) Multiphase Programmatic Approach (MPA). The project is the first phase of a 10-year program to help Pakistan modernise its [...]
results.source: Daily Times - Latest Pakistan News, World, Busines

results.title: Loans are cheaper, but manufacturers still struggle for credit — AGI
results.description: The Chief Executive Officer (CEO) of the Association of Ghana Industries (AGI), Seth Twum-Akwaboah, has said the decline in lending rates in Ghana is yet to provide significant relief to manufacturers because available credit is still not reaching the productive sectors of the economy. According to him, while businesses acknowledge the recent reduction in lending [...]

results.title: Thar Block II: SECMC prepares for Phase III expansion
results.description: Sindh Engro Coal Mining Company (SECMC) is preparing for the expansion of Phase III of Thar Block II of the Tharparkar area in Sindh, reinforcing the project’s role in reducing Pakistan’s reliance on imported fuel. The development comes as SECMC and Engro Powergen Thar Limited (EPTL) marked seven years of successful commercial operations at Thar [...]
results.source: Daily Times - Latest Pakistan News, World, Busines

results.title: Gold Rate Today, July 11, 2026: Check 22K and 24K Gold Prices in Delhi, Mumbai, Chennai and Other Cities
results.description: Gold prices in India remained largely steady on Saturday, July 11, 2026, as investors continued to assess global economic developments, inflation trends, and the outlook for interest rates. Scroll down to check the gold rate today, July 11, in Delhi, Chennai, Mumbai, Kolkata, Lucknow, Pune, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Jodhpur, Jaipur, Srinagar, Noida, Ghaziabad, Gurugram and Ahmedabad.

results.title: Micron Pours $250 Billion Into U.S. DRAM: Relief Starts 2027, Not Today
results.description: Micron DRAM investment in the U.S. hit $250 billion as the company poured first concrete at its Clay, New York megafab ahead of schedule. But the shortage driving RAM prices up 90% this quarter won't ease before 2027, when Idaho fabs begin output. Here's why HBM's four-to-one wafer math is the real story.
